      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta nogahje Eeliwâs tas
Teemaniteris/ un Bildads tas

matiteris/ un darrija/ ka tas
KUNGS us teem btj runnajs/
un tas KUNGS usluhkoja J-
jabu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS notwehr-
se Ijaba Zeetumu/ kad wiꞥsch
preekſch faweem Drangeim luh-
dje/ un tas KUNGS wairoja
attak wisſu winna Padohmu/
tas Ijabam pirmak bijis/ katain
obtruteek watraſ tappe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir wisſi winna Brahti/
un wisſus winna Mahfas/ un
wisſi/ kas winnu pirmak bii pa-
sinnufchi/ nahze pee winna/ un
ehde Maisi ar to winna Nam-
mâ/ un schehlojahs pahr winnu/
un eepreezinaja winnu pahr wis-
fu Yannu/ fo tas KUNGS tam
bij nslizzis. Un tee dewe tam
iffatrs weenu labbu Naudas
Gabbalu/ un iffatrs weenu sel-
ta Peeres-Sprahdsf.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS tweh-

fechtuhkſtoschi Kamteki/un tuhk-
ſtoschi Wehrſchu Inbgi/ un tuhk-
ſtoschas Ehetu-Mahtes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Winnam ktua arri fepti-
ri Dehti un trihs Meitas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥsch nofauze tahs

tahs tretchas Wahrdn Keren-
ppue.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tahdas skaistas
was ne tappe atrastas/ w

Un winnu Tehws dewe teei

"

    {
      "n": 16,

      "text": "Un Ijabs dshwoja

"

    {
      "n": 17,

      "text": "Un Ijabs nomirre/ n
